data.content: Approved in implementation review. Verified the refactor preserves behavior by extracting supporting hooks/components without changing the user-visible flows in waves, beats, app header, retakes, and planner views. Confirmed zero ESLint max-lines/max-lines-per-function/max-len warnings in the nine scoped files, clean typecheck, 2239 passing tests in bun run test, successful bun run build, and no diff-check issues.
